name: blockchain-voting-dapp
description: Decentralized voting system built with Hardhat, Solidity, Ethers.js, and Bootstrap.

scripts.test: cross-env CI=true HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=true HARDHAT_HIDE_SOLIDITY_SURVEY_MESSAGE=true hardhat test
scripts.deploy:localhost: cross-env CI=true HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=true hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.demo:localhost: cross-env CI=true HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=true hardhat run scripts/demo.js --network localhost
